bookmarks.title: You’ll Never Believe This but Elon Musk Doesn’t Get to Pay TSA Workers’ Salaries
bookmarks.description: His oh-so generous offer was rejected by the government. He must be so mad!
bookmarks.content:
CBS news reported on Wednesday that Elon Musks pseudo-offer to pay the salaries of TSA workers affected by the ongoing partial government shutdown has been rejected by the Trump Administration.

bookmarks.title: Apple launches budget-friendly MacBook Neo powered by an iPhone chip

bookmarks.content: The entry-level MacBook could help Apple compete with Chromebooks and low-cost Windows laptops. The entry-level MacBook could help Apple compete with Chromebook… [+2539 chars]

bookmarks.title: Our Favorite Budget TV Is On Sale
bookmarks.description: This 55-inch Vizion isn't the fanciest, but you could do a lot worse for under $300.
